programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Opening his set by describing himself as a series of white dudes, Myles Weber hones in on the humor of his life experiences in his special, joking about growing up in the hood, playing The Green Lantern in an amusement park, and his three-legged pug Taz.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Christian Pieper is an award-winning and crowd-pleasing comedian from Beaver Dam, Kentucky, now living in Los Angeles. In just five years as a performer, Christian has quickly earned acclaim for his honest, smart, and welcoming approach to personal material, layering unexpectedly subversive observations on current events, culture, and relationships.A two-time semifinalist in the prestigious Boston Comedy Festival, hes also been featured in the Crossroads Comedy Festival, Burbank Comedy Festival, and other festivals and competitions across the country. Christian has also performed abroad, having done shows for troops and civilians in eight different countries, and was a guest on the Bob & Tom show. He currently hosts and produces Adrenaline, a comedy-challenge show presented regularly at Wiseguys Comedy Club in Salt Lake City and the Hollywood Improv.

programme.title: Nick Cobb
programme.desc: Hailing from Memphis, TN, Nick Cobb attended Indiana University where he majored in Psychology and learned to obsess over meaningless nonsense. This led him to work in his first comedy club, aptly named “The Looney Bin.” It was at a tiny Beale Street bar where Nick won a stand-up competition, was bitten by the comedy bug and moved to New York to pursue The Dream. While in New York, Nick was seen on Comedy Central's Live at Gotham, VH1's Morning Buzz, AMC's Date Night as well as on NBC's “Last Comic Standing” where he not only earned a spot in the semi-finals, but was also featured in a montage of comics recognized for having highly original material. Less than a year ago, Nick took his talents to Los Angeles. Since moving out West he won the March Madness Competition at the Hollywood Improv, appeared on Comedy Central's Inside Amy Schumer, and had his late night debut on The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson. He also recently performed on AXS's Gotham Comedy Live. He also played the lead in the espn.com comedic web series “Team Players,” and has been seen in many commercials including Pepsi Max, Asthma.com, Joe's Crab Shack, Carmax and starred in an e-Trade spot during halftime of the Super Bowl! When not performing standup, Nick is brooding over that one guy in the crowd who was texting during his act.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.title: Jenna Kim Jones
programme.desc: Jenna Kim Jones is a comedian known for her strong personality and little to no upper body strength. She recently came to grips with the fact that she will never be able to do a pull up and earn her 4th grade Presidential Fitness Award though she plans to exploit this limitation into a book or reality television deal. Jenna was born in Seoul, Korea and lived there for approximately 8 years until she moved to Provo, Utah. At 18, Jenna left Provo to attend New York University where she majored in Producing and Writing for Television. During her time at NYU, she interned at Follow Productions, The Martha Show, The Late Show with David Letterman, The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and CBS Primetime Casting. After graduating from NYU, Jenna began performing stand up comedy while she worked at The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. After working at The Daily Show for almost 4 years, Jenna met her husband Allan Moss and the two were married in July of 2012 at which point Jenna left New York City to move to Los Angeles, California to pursue comedy (and sunshine). When she isn't working on her Netflix addiction, Jenna spends her days and nights writing and telling jokes all over the country. Once upon a time, Huffington Post named Jenna One of 18 Funny Women You Should Be Following On Twitter. For those of you who don't know, that is a compliment. However, it's when she gets her name on a Buzzfeed list that she'll know she's really made it. Jenna has appeared on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and performed stand up alongside some of the best comedians including Jim Gaffigan, John Oliver, Wyatt Cenac and Aasif Mandvi. Her podcast, #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones, is one of the Top 200 Comedy Podcasts on iTunes. Her first stand up comedy special also #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones is available for sale at www.jennakimjones.com/shop. JKJ released a 2nd Comedy Special, “Jenna Kim Jones Live In Hollywood” as part of the “Everyone Laughs” series on Sirius XM Laugh USA in September of 2016. Her comedy plays regularly on both Sirius XM channels Laugh USA and Jeff and Larry's Comedy Roundup. Jenna is also known for her work as the on camera host/narrator of the feature length documentary, “Meet The Mormons” which was released in theaters nationwide on October 10, 2014 and is, as of now, the 31st most successful documentary of all time.

programme.title: Will Marfori
programme.desc: Will Marfori has appeared on the Late, Late Show with Craig Ferguson and is a regular on Sirius/XM Satellite radio. Performing at comedy clubs, colleges, and cruise ships, Will tours almost 50 weeks a year all around the world. Born with Cerebral Palsy, Will never felt like he fit in until he walked on stage for the first time in 1999. He started doing comedy in Norfolk, Virginia while attending Old Dominion University. He entered a stand-up comedy contest for the student body and won. He was hooked. Poking fun at his situation was empowering and it felt good to share his comedy with other people. In 2001 Will graduated from ODU and got a job working as a house MC at the Comedy Zone in Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Karen Rontowski
programme.desc: Karen Rontowski's fast-paced, quirky and charmingly optimistic comedy has been featured in clubs, TV, radio, and at corporate events all around the world. Her stand- up showcases endearing, self-effacing and intelligent characters that catch you by surprise every time. Karen uniquely blends comedy with her experience as a Paranormal Investigator and Reiki master. From fun with her family to her travels all over this great country Karen has fun where ever she goes. Her lighthearted confusion entertains kids of all ages. She is fascinated with the “afterlife” is convinced she will someday have a near death experience because, “I never finish anything.” She explains, “Sometimes a ghost will just do the same thing over and over in life. That's why I want to move into a house that is haunted by a maid." Karen's comedy is now featured in the new line of greeting cards called “Frank and Funny” sold at Target stores everywhere and is the comedy writer for “Haunted Magazine.” She is a regular on the Bob and Tom Radio Show and is a featured performer on their CD. Karen has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, Sirius Satellite Radio, Comics Unleashed, Comedy.com, Live at Gotham and Comedy Central. She has opened for show biz legends including Bob Hope, Ray Charles, David Brenner and the Monkees.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy horror flick starring Bruce Dern and Casey Kasem. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Incredible 2-Headed Transplant!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to The Tiny Astronaut! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill and a bunch of mouse rocket enthusiasts for The Tiny Astronaut!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 70's horror classic where a series of brutal supernatural murders at Ruby's drive-in are keeping everyone on edge! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Ruby!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: If the old dusty carousel of audio cassettes at a truck stop could be distilled into a movie, this would be that movie. From the title to the fashion to the hair to the faces, one of the most 70s things you will ever experience is Trucker's Woman! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: Don't Be a Bloody Idiot
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this 1970s Australian camping safety short. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill and one angry Australian with a gun for Don't Be a Bloody Idiot.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where ancient indian gods come back from the dead to torment pretty co-eds and get whipped by Lash LaRue! Grab your whip and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for The Dark Power!

programme.title: Phantom Racer
programme.desc: Seventeen years ago, McCullough perished in a fiery crash and his rival Sawyer was to blame. When Sawyer becomes the prime suspect in a series of murders, he realizes he's not the only one in danger.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: A brilliant sociopath (Gerard Butler) orchestrates a series of high-profile murders that grip the city of Philadelphia — all from inside his jail cell. The prosecutor assigned to his case (Jamie Foxx) is the only one who can end his reign of terror.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Hang on tight as a gang of super-powered paranormal operatives takes you on a white-knuckle thrill ride. The excitement starts when a future-seeing Watcher (Dakota Fanning) convinces a telekinetic Mover (Chris Evans) to help steal a briefcase that holds a billion-dollar secret. But to outrun government agents, they must enlist a mind controlling Pusher (Camilla Belle) who could be their salvation - or their doom. Also starring Academy Award Nominee Djimon Hounsou, Push will pull you in completely.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Academy Award® and Golden Globe® winner Renée Zellweger is “remarkable” (USA TODAY) in this unforgettable portrait of showbiz legend Judy Garland.

Now, the clock is ticking - and the wildly entertaining comedy smash is off and running in this irresistible tale of sex, lies and outrageous romantic fireworks!

programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

programme.title: The Big Short

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness.

programme.title: To Gillian On Her 37th Birthday
programme.desc: A grieving widower must accept his wife's death to save himself and his relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Little Secrets
programme.desc: A precocious young violinist becomes the Secret Keeper for her neighborhood schoolmates.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl and her estranged father, learn to reconnect when they adopt an orphaned flock of geese and must find a way to teach them how to migrate for the winter.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Karate master Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita) goes to Boston to attend a military reunion. While there, he visits with Louisa, the widow of his former commander, and meets her granddaughter, Julie (Hilary Swank) whose parents have recently died in a car crash. When Julie surprises Miyagi with her knowledge of karate, he takes her to a Buddhist monastery for training and to help her come to terms with her grief.

programme.title: Doctor Faustus
programme.desc: An aging scholar sells his soul to the devil in exchange for youth, knowledge and power.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The effects of a handsome stranger on a small Kansas town.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: Three On A Couch
programme.desc: In order to convince his psyhiatrist-fiance to marry him and honeymoon in Paris a man must don various disguises to help cure three of her women patients.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: Goodbye, Columbus
programme.desc: Neil is a poor Bronx librarian and Brenda is a pampered Jewish princess from Westchester. Benjamin and MacGraw are superb in their film debuts as the lovers who try to cross class lines amidst kisses and her parents' stiff opposition.

programme.title: Barefoot In The Park
programme.desc: Robert Redford is Mister Straight. Jane Fonda is his new wife. As the ecstasy of the honeymoon gives way to the reality of setting up housekeeping in a five-flight walk-up, the harmony of marriage turns to comical discord.

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: A Monster Calls
programme.desc: A boy imagines a monster that helps him deal with his difficult life and see the world in a different way.

programme.title: The Palm Beach Story
programme.desc: Money makes the world go 'round, or so Gerry believes when she divorces her husband and marries a millionaire.

programme.title: The Thrill of it All
programme.desc: Beverly Boyer becomes the "Happy Soap” spokeswoman and the only way her family sees her is on TV.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Filmed on location in Glasgow, Isle of Man and Dover, this film centers on Frank (Peter Mullan), a newly laid-off middle-aged man who seeks to soothe his own strained familial relations and shore up his own self-confidence by doing the near impossible - swimming the English Channel. As Frank plunges headlong into his challenge, his family is swept along on the tide of his faith and strength. Also starring Academy Award®-nominee Brenda Blethyn.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman who comes from a life of privilege falls for the owner of a soup kitchen after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his seven year old daughter.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: Christmas Crush VOD

programme.title: The Merry In-laws
programme.desc: After Alex gets engaged to Peter, she goes to meet his parents for the first time, not knowing they are actually Santa and Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Holiday Engagement

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do?
programme.desc: A small diverse group of Americans vow to walk in the steps of Jesus.They ask themselves "What Would Jesus Do?

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: When Love Came To Town
programme.desc: Abby, an author is used to making up quirky, charming characters, but here in Bliss they have sprung to life.

programme.title: What We Do For Love
programme.desc: Sophie secures a job at the famous wellness firm but soon clashes with the chief life coach Jason.

programme.title: A Christmas Karen
programme.desc: Karen is an entitled middle-aged woman whose demanding nature has alienated her neighbors and family. After a series of incidents displaying her privilege and prejudice, Karen receives an 'intervention' by some unconventional spirits.

programme.title: The Family Holiday
programme.desc: A thirty-something pool hustler stands to receive a ten-million dollar inheritance if he can prove he's forsaken his street days and settled down with a family.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Miracle on Highway 34
programme.desc: A diverse set of characters find themselves together in an old diner in a small town on Christmas Eve during a snowstorm. While a young expecting couple tries to make it home on a night that's anything but silent.

programme.title: My Little Brother
programme.desc: Three siblings must figure out what to do with a younger brother whom they were suddenly introduced to and did not know even existed before.

programme.title: A Brand New Life
programme.desc: Jin-hee, aged 9, reluctantly enters an orphanage, struggling with feelings of abandonment by her father.

programme.title: Secret Reunion
programme.desc: North Korean spy Ji-won and South Korean intelligence agent Han-kyu form an uneasy partnership for profit.

programme.title: Angel is Dead
programme.desc: Do-Kyung meets Ga-In on a boat headed to an isolated island. At that night, they spend the night together.

programme.title: 10 Reasons Why Men Cheat
programme.desc: In the wake of a wedding catastrophe, three couples discover the meaning of commitment, while discussing what women want to know most of all when it comes to men and relationships. WHY DO MEN CHEAT?

programme.title: Wannabe a Star
programme.desc: Dr. Cool is the new fast talking acting teacher at a local performing arts school, except he's never taught a class before, let alone an acting class. The classes, administration, and investors soon begin to call him on his bluff, and threaten to unravel his secrets.

programme.title: The Wake Up Call
programme.desc: Stefan Malone, a gifted student in science and math, is crushed when he finds out about his mother's cancer diagnosis. He dedicates his life and research to finding a cure at Emerson, but will his dedication and determination consume him?

programme.title: New Year New Us 2: #LoveGoals
programme.desc: On a mission to maintain a successful marriage in a city full of temptation, Bakari & Imani are trying their best to get on the same page. But just when things seem to be getting back on track, secrets and lies threaten to tear down everything they've built.

programme.title: An American Crime
programme.desc: Gertrude Baniszewski, a divorced mother of several children, agrees to take care of two girls, Sylvia and Jennie, while their parents travel with a carnival. Though her eldest daughter is the real troublemaker, Gertrude vents all her bitterness and frustration on innocent Sylvia. Gertrude imprisons the girl in the basement and tortures her, eventually encouraging her children to follow suit.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: A hit man (Michael Shannon) keep his violent profession secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and kids.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his son.

programme.title: Double Identity
programme.desc: An American doctor (Val Kilmer) takes a detour in life and becomes a victim of mistaken identity when he helps a mysterious woman (Izabella Miko) escape from her would-be assailant.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Sorpresa: Kerim le adelanta su sorpresa de cumpleaños a Fatmagül. Meltem va a despedirse de Mustafá. Rasad se da cuenta de que su plan para hundir a Turaner no funcionará.

programme.title: Historia de un Amor
programme.desc: Historia de un Amor - Corazón Roto: Korkut finalmente le dice a Ceylan la verdad. Ella tiene el corazón roto, pero amará y apoyará al hombre de su vida hasta su último aliento.

programme.title: Enterrado
programme.desc: Paul Conroy despierta tres metros bajo tierra sin idea de quién lo puso ahí o por qué. Sepultado con solo un teléfono celular y un encendedor.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Dura traición
programme.desc: Fernando descubre a Rosario y a Armando intentado huir del pueblo. Fernando mata a Armando y a Rosario al saber que lo ha traicionado. Gabriela sospecha que Fernando la engaña con otra mujer.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Cuadro destrozado
programme.desc: Alguien en la mansión destruye el cuadro de Mili y su madre, por lo que todos tienen un culpable en la mira, poniendo a Luciana como la principal responsable. Karla cae en la trampa de Damián y Fernando.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Fuera del viñedo
programme.desc: David quiere que Marta se disculpe con Lilian por haberla golpeado, pero ella se niega. Por otro lado, David le dice a Graciela que Marta se irá del viñedo y ella se pone feliz con la noticia.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le dice a Matilde que piensa que Rosario podría ser su madre y le pregunta si le asustaría la idea ella responde que si Rosario fuera su madre, el padre Urbano se lo habría dicho. Catalina le dice a doña Juana que quiere casarse con Adolfo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Más pronto de lo que esperas
programme.desc: Santa le dice a Maricruz que la mamá de Solita ha regresado y la está buscando Simona pierde el control y saca a su hijo de la cuna diciendo que se deshará de él.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura
programme.desc: Daniela se pone mal al saber que Rodrigo está volviéndose loco. Isadora le pide a Francisco que no la abandone y pronto se deshaga de Sofía. Sanjuana entristece al saber que Hilario la está engañando.

programme.title: Teresa: Duras decisiones
programme.desc: Teresa no piensa perder más su tiempo y está decidida a divorciarse de Arturo si él no deja de desconfiar de ella. Juana le confiesa a Teresa el gran amor que siente por Cutberto.

programme.title: Rubí: Traición
programme.desc: Rubí y Héctor se besan, él confundido evita a Maribel Alejandro queda a cargo de un proyecto importante en el hospital Héctor busca a Rubí para platicar y ella le hace creer que lo quiere y deben de alejarse porque no quiere hacerle daño a Maribel.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando le dice a Soraya que no la ama, pero ella está decidida a hacer cualquier cosa para estar con él. Penélope le confiesa a María que la odia por tener una mejor posición que ella.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Los planes de Penélope para inculpar a María de un robo que no cometió fallan y descubren que es ella la verdadera culpable. Gonzalo le informa a María que será liberada.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina le quita el respirador a Santiago y logra hacer que muera. María Mercedes recibe la triste noticia de que Santiago ha muerto.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El licenciado Robles le informa a María Mercedes que tiene que presentarse al entierro de Santiago, debido a que ahora es su viuda. Jorge Luis se sorprende al saber que María Mercedes fue la esposa de Santiago.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se presenta con Marimar y le da las gracias por haber retirado las demandas además de pedirle la custodia de su hija Inocencia le confiesa a Sergio su amor.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio es expulsado de Valle Encantado y Bella investiga las razones. Bella se enfrenta al gobernador y le pide una explicación sobre la expulsión de Sergio.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Rosenda llora al saber que ha perdió su cargo como carcelera. María le salva la vida a Penélope en el incendio que causó en la cárcel. Nandito sufre al saber que Luis Fernando se ha divorciado de María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya se alegra al saber que María ha muerto. A raíz del incendio en la cárcel, la familia de María piensa que está muerta y están esperando identificar los cuerpos.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe le pide a Moisés que lo ayude a reconquistar a Sandra. Gabriela comienza a sentir una gran atracción por Horacio al verlo cantar en la feria. Horacio vuelve a enamorarse de Ivana al verla llegar a la feria con un vestido muy provocador.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo descubre que Ivana es la responsable de que el pueblo haya humillado a Valentina. Moisés le pide a Enriqueta que acepte el noviazgo de Sandra con Felipe. Rosendo enfrenta a Ivana para pedirle que se aleje de Valentina.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le cuenta sus deseos a Cristóbal sobre algún día poder llegar a ser padre. Por su lado, Asunción se muestra preocupada al ver que Hipólita se ha escapado de la casa.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Juana le confiesa a Diego que Hipólita tiene un hijo de Luis. Juana le dice a Hipólita que la única manera en que ella se puede quedar en México es estando separada de su hijo.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Martín le informa a Luis que Hipólita está en el convento y su criada se fue con el bebé. Fray Álvaro le dice a Luis que cumpla con sus funciones maritales y lo culpa por el estado de Esperanza.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Hipólita recibe un mensaje muy importante de Martín gracias a la ayuda de Margarita. Por su parte, Luis le ofrece a Hipólita ayuda para poder salir del convento.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Enriqueta le pide a Felipe que se aleje de Sandra. Ivana le pide a Leonor que la ayude a romper el compromiso de Valentina y José Miguel. Ivana le confiesa a Leonor que Federico está dispuesto a divorciarse de ella.

programme.title: La usurpadora
programme.desc: Una joven humilde se deja manipular por su hermana gemela para que la reemplace y ella se pueda ir con otro hombre.

programme.title: La gata: Amistad entre la basura
programme.desc: Pablo invita a Esmeralda a su casa para darle algo de comer, pero ella lo rechaza porque tiene que ir a pedir limosna Lorenza encuentra a Esmeralda en su casa y le dice que no piensa permitir que esté cerca de Pablo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Una dura vida
programme.desc: Máximo echa a Ana Paula y a su familia de su casa después de que Ana Paula se negara a ser suya. Ana Paula llega a la hacienda de Rogelio para comenzar a trabajar como enfermera.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Terrible discusión
programme.desc: Antonio le dice a Victoria que no le dejará la empresa a Bruno, pues no es un hombre responsable. En medio de una discusión con Bruno, Antonio sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La desalmada: La tragedia
programme.desc: Carmelo amenaza a Santiago para que firme la venta de sus tierras. Isabella llega a la Ciudad de México en compañía de sus padres, y se reencuentra con Rafael y David. Santiago y Fernanda celebran su boda, pero sufren una tragedia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Florencia enamorada
programme.desc: Damián teme que Gael lo quiera matar por haber impedido su boda. Florencia le confiesa a Enrique sus mentiras y engaños.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: La muerte de la nana

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Henry Catchpole is back on his favorite topic: Rallying! Of all the WRC Group B rally cars, the Lancia Delta S4 is the wildest, which makes the Stradale (or street version) very special indeed. Lancia was meant to build a couple of hundred to satisfy the homologation rules of Group B at the time, but someone was clearly a bit lax with their counting as it's thought only around 70 or 80 were ever made. This is chassis number 033.Next, Henry jumps in a Lotus Elise restomod that features some unique touches inspired by the legendary McLaren F1 supercar.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Henry Catchpole reviews Prodrive's INSANE Subaru restomod, the P25.Part 2: Henry plays a little game of "2-Car Solution," but with an interesting twist: two cars, same engine?

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Gateway Bronco's latest and greatest version of the iconic Ford SUV is quite the restomod. Not only does the Luxe-GT have the sort of paint job that makes it look like a ray of sunshine wherever you park it, there is also a brand new chassis underneath. Gateway claims that this imparts the type of performance usually only found in modern SUVs. Part 2: After reviewing the Alfaholics Giulia Super R 270, Henry Catchpole thinks this might just be the one car to rule them all. Why? Well it has both verve and versatility. It is a restomod, so you have all the glorious interactivity and tactility typical in such a creation - think Singer, Eagle, Kimera and a whole host of others, including Alfaholics' own GTA-Rs. But then add more than a dash of practicality. With back seats and a decent boot, this is suddenly a car that will happily tackle a whole host of tasks not normally associated with restomods.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode, Henry Catchpole finally gets to drive the incredible Aston Martin Valkyrie. Under the spectacular floodlights of the Sakhir F1 Circuit in Bahrain, we got some answers as to whether this hypercar developed with Red Bull lives up to the promise of being one of the all-time greats. In part 2, Henry drives the all-new Aston Martin DB12, which represents the first of a new generation of the legendary DB nameplate.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode, Henry drives Mercedes' SLS AMG Black Series and AMG GT Black Series, two of the wildest, rarest, most expensive (and longest-named) cars ever to emerge from Affalterbach. But the reason they feel so extreme might not be the one you imagine.In part 2, another famous Mercedes take center stage as Henry reviews a wild restomod version of the McLaren Mercedes SLR HDK.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode of The Driver's Seat, Henry Catchpole drives the new Caterham Super Seven 600. After than, he has the extraordinary opportunity to drive Eddie Hall's Derby Bentley. Eddie Hall was the only driver to ever complete the 24 Hours of Le Man by himself.

programme.title: The NEW Ferrari Purosangue and Roma Spider | Henry Catchpole
programme.desc: Henry Catchpole drives Ferrari's new V12-powered SUV in the mountains of northern Italy to try to decipher exactly what the Purosangue is all about.Next, Henry reviews the new Ferrari Roma Spider.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Henry drives not one but two Porsches with a GTS badge on the back… and one will surprise you. Everybody knows that Porsche's GTS models are the sweet spots in their respective ranges. Short of full-blown GT cars, they are the most driver-focused versions. But one GTS model seems to be overlooked as a proper driver's car. Yet the brilliant Taycan GTS should be celebrated.Part 2: The new Volkswagen ID. Buzz isn't officially a campervan… yet. However, Henry Catchpole has found a way to turn it into a Camper.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Henry Catchpole puts the latest fast Audi Avant through its paces around town, in the hills and on the amazing Ascari race track in Southern Spain.Part 2: Henry jumps in another high-performance wagon, the BMW M3 Touring.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Henry Catchpole reviews the MST Mk1: Motorsport Tools' Ford Escort Mk1 restomod.Part 2: Henry jumps in another restomod, this time from Tolman Motorsport. With a 1.9L engine, ported 16-valve head, new cams, fly-by-wire throttle, and bespoke ECU, this Peugeot 205 GTi Tolman Edition hot hatch just might be the ultimate version of this car.

programme.title: ICONS with Jason Cammisa
programme.desc: This action-packed documentary celebrates the achievements of the man who brought you the racing Porsche 911, the 917, the Bugatti Veyron, the Audi Quattro, the VW Phaeton, the Mercedes OM617 turbodiesel, TDI, DSG, XL1 and... Dieselgate.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: The McLaren F1 and the GMA T.50 together on the road for the very first time! Need we say more? Henry Catchpole drives Gordon Murray's two, three-pedal, three-seat supercars back-to-back. Twin tests simply don't get any better.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Living in a construction zone is an unpleasant reality for homeowners undertaking a renovation. The hope is that the mess and discomfort will be as short lived as possible. For Alex and Marie and their 2 children, a planned 3-month renovation dragged out to a year and a half with no end in sight. They were beginning to feel like prisoners in their own home- until Mike and the team arrive on the scene.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: "Dave", a photographer, wants to build a garage type structure in his backyard that will serve as his photo studio. He does everything by the book - has blueprints drawn up and approved, takes out construction permits and even involves his neighbors. What Dave gets for his diligence is a multitude of stall tactics and puzzling stop work orders from various city officials. Only after the Mayor intervenes, is the work finally completed (or so he thinks). Three years later, the studio's flat roof is plagued by constant leaks. In frustration, Dave brings in Mike Holmes to inspect the work. Mike immediately identifies the problem - the waterproof membrane was never actually finished! The Holmes On Homes team discovers that the water damage to the flat roof is so extensive, they have no choice but to pull it all down!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This story highlights the work of a modern day ''Snake Oil Salesman''- a contractor that doesn't fit the stereotypical con-artist profile. His slick computer assisted sales pitch and impressive portfolio eventually gave way to sloppy workmanship and incompetent engineering. The basement facade put up by this contractor finally came crashing down when the newly installed ceiling collapsed, prompting the homeowners to place a distress call to Mike Holmes.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Rebecca and Thomas had several contractors bid on their renovation project, and when all of them came in with quotes that were lower than what they had initially expected, they thought they'd found a deal. Pipes burst in the ceiling of the basement, flooding down the walls and leaking through the new pot lights. Then they discovered electrical outlets in other parts of the home were sparking while others were not working. In this episode, Mike explores the true cost of a basement renovation, and the pitfalls of competitive "underbidding" by contractors.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: When Jeff discovers that his newly built house has a crumbling concrete foundation with one third of the minimum strength required by code, he calls Mike Holmes to save his home. Mike and the HOH team build a new custom foundation within walls of the existing foundation and devise a plan to protect the weakened exterior from further damage.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane and Ron had a tiny quarter sized water stain on the bedroom ceiling of their six-year-old townhouse. They had a roofing contractor come and repair the balcony above the leak. The contractor ended up having to rip up the existing balcony membrane only to discover the engineered joists below were completely rotted through. The homeowners could not find a contractor willing to take on fixing this structural mess and asked Mike if he was up for the challenge.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Kristine and Terry needed more living space for their expanding family. They decided to add a second story addition over the garage in order to add a bedroom and bathroom. When the contractor demanded full payment before the job was completed, the homeowners refused to pay. The contractor placed a Lien on their home stating that the renovation was 99 percent complete. Mike and the team finish the job and demonstrate just how incomplete the job really was.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Marketa Dickson VS Marques Moody

programme.title: Kodijah Hamiel VS Wayne Hamiel
programme.desc: Kodijah and Wayne have both cheated during their marriage, now Wayne questions whether he's the father of their daughter and is demanding a DNA test.

programme.title: Rodney Frye VS Cherise Frye

programme.title: Jer'Kiah Shippy VS Christopher Green

programme.title: Kay Upchurch VS Dwayne Upchurch

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When a baby kangaroo is brought into the clinic, veterinarian Chris Brown does everything he can to try to save this fragile infant. But can the little joey make it without his mom? programme.sub-title: Dally (Jack russel) and Spanky (Miniature horse) / Lola (King charles cavalier) and Pepper (Bunny)

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.desc: The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes. During the earth's formation, the South American continent evolved as the most autonomous of the continents. The area developed its own unique flora and fauna, jungles with unbelievable biodiversity, climbers and vines. Even today, the number of tropical plants in the region remains a mystery. programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: Critics have called it "OPEN WATER on a ski lift" and "JAWS in the snow." It remains perhaps the most intense and terrifying film of the year: As Sunday evening falls, three snowboarding friends decide to take one last run down the slope. Halfway up the mountain, their chair lift stops, the lights go out and the resort closes for the week. They are stranded, but the worst is still to come. A storm is approaching. Frostbite is setting in. And on the ground below them, a pack of hungry wolves has gathered to wait. Kevin Zegers (DAWN OF THE DEAD, WRONG TURN), Shawn Ashmore (X-MEN, THE RUINS) and Emma Bell star in the relentlessly chilling thriller from writer/director Adam Green (HATCHET) that Harry Knowles of Ain't It Cool News hails as "a vicious, scary and horrifying experience...FROZEN is a howling good time!"
